title: The Awakening
writer: Frances Marion, H.H. Caldwell, Carey Wilson
actors: Vilma Bánky, Walter Byron, Louis Wolheim
plot: In Alsace just before the World War, beautiful, virtuous peasant Marie Ducrot, who falls in love with Count Karl von Hagen--a lieutenant in the German Army--is seen visiting Karl in his quarters, and an angry mob of townspeople hu...
